rationale: EV-001 shows reg.exe executed at High integrity level to set HKCU\Environment\UserInitMprLogonScript to a batch file located in the user's Temp directory (C:\Users\user-01\AppData\Local\Temp\art.bat), and A0 confirms the registry write succeeded. UserInitMprLogonScript is a well-known persistence mechanism that executes the specified script at every user logon. Placing the payload in %TEMP% with the name 'art.bat' (consistent with Atomic Red Team test artifacts) strongly indicates deliberate persistence establishment. The parent process (cmd.exe with a bare command line) provides no legitimate administrative context to explain this action, and no evidence of cleanup or reversal is present.
